mapper.select: /* selectTmDispatchDestList */ select concat(TT.CUSTKEY, TT.DESTKEY, TT.SAATC06) as ROWKEY , concat(TF.SIGFLPH, TF.SIGFLNM) as SIGNITURE , concat(TF.PICFLPH, TF.PICFLNM) as PICTURE , MT.PTNAMLC , ME.DENAMLC , TT.COMPKEY , TT.VHPLNKY , TT.VHPLNIT , TT.CUSTKEY , TT.DESTKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , TT.DESTORD , TT.SHTRSTS , TT.RETODYN , MO.OWNAMLC , TT.SKUMKEY , TT.SKUDESC , TT.SKUSKEY , TT.SOITQTY , TT.TRITQTY , TT.SUOMKEY , TT.TRUNTYP , TT.TRUNPID , TT.SAATN01 , TT.SAATN02 , TT.SAATN03 , TT.SAATN04 , TT.SAATN05 , TT.SAATC01 , TT.SAATC02 , TT.SAATC03 , TT.SAATC04 , TT.SAATC05 , TT.SAATC06 , TT.SAATC07 , TT.SAATC08 , TT.SAATC09 , TT.SAATC10 , TT.SHTRPTY , (select case when REPITDT = ' ' then '' when REPITDT is NULL then '' else Fn_com_todate(TT.REPITDT) end) as REPITDT , (select case when REPITTM = ' ' then '' when REPITTM is NULL then '' else Fn_com_totime(TT.REPITTM) end) as REPITTM , TT.RSNCODE , TT.RSNREMK , TT.COPODKY , TT.COPODIT , TT.COOUTKY , TT.COOUTIT , TT.OERETKY , TT.OERETIT , TT.EOASNKY , TT.EOASNIT , TT.RCVDCKY , TT.RCVDCIT , TT.REFSODC , TT.REFDNDC , TT.REFDNIT , TT.REFSDDC , TT.REFSDIT , Fn_com_todate(TT.CREDATE) as CREDATE , Fn_com_totime(TT.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(TT.COMPKEY, TT.CREUSER) as CREUSER , Fn_com_todate(TT.LMODATE) as LMODATE , Fn_com_totime(TT.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(TT.COMPKEY, TT.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , TT.INDIBZL , TT.INDIARC , TT.UPDTCHK , Fn_com_totime(TF.CRETIME) as TFCRETM , TF.TRNMEMO , TF.FTFTKNO , if(TF.SIGSVIP = ' ', '', TF.SIGSVIP) as SIGSVIP , if(TF.SIGFLPH = ' ', '', TF.SIGFLPH) as SIGFLPH , if(TF.SIGFLNM = ' ', '', TF.SIGFLNM) as SIGFLNM , if(TF.PICSVIP = ' ', '', TF.PICSVIP) as PICSVIP , if(TF.PICFLPH = ' ', '', TF.PICFLPH) as PICFLPH , if(TF.PICFLNM = ' ', '', TF.PICFLNM) as PICFLNM from TPLNIT TT left outer join TPLFIT TF on TF.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY and TF.VHPLNKY = TT.VHPLNKY and TF.CUSTKEY = TT.CUSTKEY and TF.DESTKEY = TT.DESTKEY inner join MPTNMA MT on MT.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY and MT.PTNRKEY = TT.CUSTKEY inner join MDESMA ME on ME.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY and ME.DESTKEY = TT.DESTKEY inner join MWARMA MW on MW.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY and MW.WAREKEY = TT.WAREKEY inner join MOWRMA MO on MO.COMPKEY = TT.COMPKEY and MO.OWNERKY = TT.OWNERKY where TT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and TT.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} and TT.VHPLNIT is not null order by TT.DESTORD
/* selectCarrierList */ select PTNRKEY , PTNAMLC from MPTNMA where COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} and PTNRTYP in ('CARRIER') and PTUSEYN = 'Y' group by PTNRKEY, PTNAMLC order by PTNRORD
